creator: phil@aluminanetworks.com.au
text: Alumina Consulting is an Australian based consulting company specialising in providing services to the ISP/Telco market and SMB customers. We offer installation, support and maintenance services for FreeBSD based systems, including mail, DNS, database and web servers. We also offer a wide range of other solutions, such as Asterisk based voice systems, Linux servers and network design and implementation services. Please contact us at sales@aluminaconsulting.com.au or visit our website www.aluminaconsulting.com.au.
